_codex_staging.notes: Procter & Gamble transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official-domain search in prior handoff did not verify an official written transcript; StockAnalysis transcript pages provide readable transcript text.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.

coverage_summary.fiscal_year_note: P&G uses fiscal-year labeling; FY Q1 occurs in the prior calendar year.
